segments.text: For this cause I Paul, the prisoner of Jesus Christ for you Gentiles
segments.speaker: Paul

segments.text: If ye have heard of the dispensation of the grace of God which is given me to you-ward
segments.speaker: Paul

segments.text: How that by revelation
he made known unto me the mystery
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: as I wrote afore in few words
Whereby, when ye read, ye may understand my knowledge in the mystery of Christ
Which in other ages was not made known unto the sons of men, as it is now revealed
unto his holy apostles and prophets by the Spirit
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: That the Gentiles should be fellowheirs, and of the same body, and partakers of his promise in Christ by the gospel
Whereof I was made a minister, according to the gift of the grace of God given unto me by the effectual working of his power
segments.speaker: Paul

segments.text: Unto me, who am less than the least of all saints, is this grace given, that I should preach among the Gentiles the unsearchable riches of Christ
segments.speaker: Paul

segments.text: And to make all men see what is the fellowship of the mystery, which from the beginning of the world hath been hid in God, who created all things by Jesus Christ
To the intent that now unto the principalities and powers in heavenly places might be known by the church the manifold wisdom of God
According to the eternal purpose which he purposed in Christ Jesus our Lord
In whom we have boldness and access with confidence by the faith of him
Wherefore I desire that ye faint not at my tribulations for you, which is your glory
segments.speaker: Paul

segments.text: For this cause I bow my knees unto the Father of our Lord Jesus Christ
segments.speaker: Paul

segments.text: Of whom the whole family in heaven and earth is named
That he would grant you, according to the riches of his glory, to be strengthened with might by his Spirit in the inner man
segments.speaker: Paul

segments.text: That Christ may dwell in your hearts by faith; that ye, being rooted and grounded in love
segments.speaker: Paul

segments.text: May be able to comprehend with all saints what is the breadth, and length, and depth, and height
segments.speaker: Paul

segments.text: And to know the love of Christ, which passeth knowledge, that ye might be filled with all the fulness of God
segments.speaker: Paul

segments.text: Now unto him that is able to do exceeding abundantly above all that we ask or think, according to the power that worketh in us
Unto him be glory in the church by Christ Jesus throughout all ages, world without end. Amen
